name: closed loop step catalog-to-fetcher flows a cataloged source identifier into the fetcher script
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf 'sources: [{id: owasp-asvs}]\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/closed-loop-test.sh" --step catalog-to-fetcher --registry .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'catalog_source=owasp-asvs flowed_into=fetcher' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
